titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Church Postcard Collection
titlestmt.author: Yale Divinity Library staff

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday August 8, 2022 at 22:00

did.abstract: The collection includes photographic postcards showing church buildings primarily in New England but also elsewhere throughout the United States.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The material is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The majority of the postcards were received from the Andover Newton Theological School when its library collections came to the Yale Divinity Library in 2017.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes photographic postcards showing church buildings primarily in New England but also elsewhere throughout the United States. Many denominations are represented but Baptist and Congregational churches predominate. The postcards are arranged by denomination, then by state, then by city. Many of the Baptist, Congregational, and Methodist church postcards were digitized through the Atla Cooperative Digital Resources Initiative and are available online through the Atla Digital Library. URLs for available digital versions are noted in the finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Church Postcard Collection (RG 315), Special Collections, Yale Divinity School Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Image available in Atla Digital Library: https://dl.atla.com/concern/works/ms35tg48d?locale=en

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Image available in Atla Digital Library: https://dl.atla.com/concern/works/ms35tg49p?locale=en

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Image available in Atla Digital Library: https://dl.atla.com/concern/works/vx021m55g?locale=en
